problem: Women lack personalized, accurate information about their menstrual cycles, fertility windows, pregnancy progression, and overall reproductive health. Traditional tracking methods are manual and don't provide predictive insights or medical guidance.
solution: AI-powered women's health app with 420+ million users for period tracking, ovulation prediction, pregnancy monitoring, and perimenopause support. Features include cycle and symptom tracking, fertility insights, pregnancy week-by-week guidance, symptom checker, and anonymous mode for privacy.
